metadata.description: Resource group containing the regional Network Watcher.
Existing Network Watcher name for the target region.
Deploy NSG flow logs. Default false because new NSG flow log creation is blocked in many tenants/regions.
Number of web VMs. Fixed to 2 because the AGW backend pool uses two static backend IPs.
VM size for web and app tiers.
Web Deploy package from the web-app-vm-dsc sample.
DSC module package from the web-app-vm-dsc sample.
Configuration function from the DSC package.

settings.commandToExecute: [concat('powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Install-WindowsFeature Web-Server; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path C:\\validation -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path C:\\temp -Force; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri ', parameters('webDeployPackageUri'), ' -OutFile C:\\temp\\webapp.zip; Expand-Archive -Path C:\\temp\\webapp.zip -DestinationPath C:\\inetpub\\wwwroot -Force; Set-Content -Path C:\\inetpub\\wwwroot\\inventory-connection.txt -Value ''', variables('sqlConnectionString'), '''; $app = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 10.110.2.100 -Port 8080; $sql = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName ', variables('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net -Port 1433; Set-Content -Path C:\\validation\\web-flow-results.txt -Value (''App8080='' + $app.TcpTestSucceeded + '';Sql1433='' + $sql.TcpTestSucceeded);"')]

[concat('powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Install-WindowsFeature Web-Server; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path C:\\validation -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path C:\\inetpub\\app -Force; $appcmd = Join-Path $env:WinDir ''System32\\inetsrv\\appcmd.exe''; & $appcmd delete site AppSite; & $appcmd add site /name:AppSite /bindings:http/*:8080: /physicalPath:C:\\inetpub\\app; $sql = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName ', variables('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net -Port 1433; Set-Content -Path C:\\validation\\app-flow-results.txt -Value (''Sql1433='' + $sql.TcpTestSucceeded); $clientId=''', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', variables('appSqlUamiName')), '2023-01-31').clientId, '''; $tokenUri = ''http://169.254.169.254/metadata/identity/oauth2/token?api-version=2018-02-01&resource=https%3A%2F%2Fdatabase.windows.net%2F&client_id='' + $clientId; $accessToken = (Invoke-RestMethod -Method GET -Headers @{Metadata=''true''} -Uri $tokenUri).access_token; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data; $conn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection ''Server=tcp:', variables('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog=', variables('sqlDbName'), ';Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;''; $conn.AccessToken = $accessToken; $conn.Open(); $seed = $conn.CreateCommand(); $seed.CommandText = ''IF OBJECT_ID(''''dbo.InventoryItems'''',''''U'''') IS NULL CREATE TABLE dbo.InventoryItems (ItemId INT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, ItemName NVARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, Qty INT NOT NULL, LastUpdated DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT SYSUTCDATETIME()); MERGE dbo.InventoryItems AS T USING (SELECT 1001 AS ItemId, N''''Widget'''' AS ItemName, 42 AS Qty) AS S ON T.ItemId=S.ItemId WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ItemName=S.ItemName, Qty=S.Qty, LastUpdated=SYSUTCDATETIME() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (ItemId, ItemName, Qty, LastUpdated) VALUES (S.ItemId, S.ItemName, S.Qty, SYSUTCDATETIME());''; $null = $seed.ExecuteNonQuery(); $read = $conn.CreateCommand(); $read.CommandText = ''SELECT TOP 1 ItemId, ItemName, Qty FROM dbo.InventoryItems ORDER BY LastUpdated DESC''; $r = $read.ExecuteReader(); $line = ''No data''; if ($r.Read()) { $line = ''ItemId='' + $r[''ItemId''] + '';Name='' + $r[''ItemName''] + '';Qty='' + $r[''Qty''] }; $r.Close(); $conn.Close(); Set-Content -Path C:\\validation\\db-line.txt -Value $line; Set-Content -Path C:\\inetpub\\app\\index.html -Value (''

Inventory App Tier

Reached app server behind internal load balancer.

DB Line: '' + $line + ''

Updated: '' + (Get-Date -Format s) + ''

'');"')]

value: AGW subnet to Web subnet TCP/80 is allowed in Azure Firewall and Web NSG.
Web subnet to App ILB 10.110.2.100 TCP/8080 is allowed in Azure Firewall and App NSG.
App subnet to SQL Private Endpoint subnet TCP/1433 is allowed in Azure Firewall.
Azure Bastion subnet to Web/App subnets TCP/3389 is allowed in Azure Firewall and NSGs.
Web and App VMs run post-deploy Test-NetConnection scripts and write results to C:\validation.
